overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a wizard character walking through a dimly lit gothic castle hall. The character passes beneath a massive suspended dragon skeleton while approaching an arched stone doorway, with warm candlelight illuminating the stone walls and vaulted ceilings.

scene_state.functional_zone: vaulted castle corridor beneath suspended skeleton exhibit

agents.ego_description: walking slowly beneath the massive dragon skeleton, looking up at the ribcage and spine suspended from the ceiling

entered.detail: massive vertebral column and ribcage of a dragon suspended from the vaulted ceiling
circular iron chandelier with multiple lit candles hanging from chains
dark wooden support beams along the vaulted ceiling
arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting
pointed stone archway leading to another area, with blue light visible beyond
lit wall-mounted torch sconce on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow gothic corridor beneath a massive suspended dragon skeleton. Warm candlelight from an iron chandelier and wall sconces illuminates the stone walls and vaulted wooden ceiling as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open castle hall with decorative flooring and exit doorway

events.description: moving from the narrow vaulted corridor into the more open hall area
character turns right toward the gothic arched doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through the open hall and approaching the stone doorway on the right side

entered.detail: circular geometric pattern inlaid in the marble floor
tall wooden cabinet with carved details against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider hall with a decorative floor pattern becoming visible. The dragon skeleton recedes to the left as the character approaches a gothic arched doorway on the right. A wooden cabinet comes into view near the doorway as the character turns to exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow gothic corridor that gradually opens into a wider, ornate hall. It begins with the character walking beneath a massive suspended dragon skeleton, where warm candlelight from iron chandeliers and wall sconces illuminates the stone walls and vaulted wooden ceiling. As the character moves forward, the space expands to reveal a decorative floor pattern while the dragon skeleton recedes to the left. The scene then shifts toward a gothic arched doorway on the right, passing a wooden cabinet as the character turns to exit the hall.
